title: Tunisian Lamb Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful casserole dish featuring lamb and a blend of Tunisian spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the Tunisian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chickpeas, rice, and water. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the Dutch oven and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes, then reduce the heat to 325°F (165°C) and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
